name: Performapal Lebellman
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＥＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンタメイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>レ・ベルマン
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
Once per turn: You can increase the Levels of all Pendulum Summoned monsters you currently control by 1 (even if this card leaves the field).

[ Monster Effect ] 
Once per turn: You can declare a Level from 1 to 5, then target 1 other "Performapal" monster you control; until the end of this turn, reduce this card's Level by the declared Level, and if you do, increase the Level of the other monster by the same amount.
pend_eff: Once per turn: You can increase the Levels of all Pendulum Summoned monsters you currently control by 1 (even if this card leaves the field).
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can declare a Level from 1 to 5, then target 1 other "Performapal" monster you control; until the end of this turn, reduce this card's Level by the declared Level, and if you do, increase the Level of the other monster by the same amount.
eff: Once per turn: You can declare a Level from 1 to 5, then target 1 other "Performapal" monster you control; until the end of this turn, reduce this card's Level by the declared Level, and if you do, increase the Level of the other monster by the same amount.
